verdict: Solid occlusive-based night cream with glycerin humectant and silicone for smoothness. Effective but less innovative than CeraVe's ceramic-focused approach.

_research.name: Cetaphil Rich Hydrating Night Cream
pros: Strong occluding agents trap moisture overnight
Suitable for very dry or compromised skin
Clean ingredient profile without common irritants
_research.con: Lacks ceramides and advanced barrier-repair ingredients found in competitor products.
